final_draft:
Subject: Northbridge is now SOC 2 Type II certified

Preview text: Confirming our data handling practices meet enterprise security standards

Body:
Enterprise security teams need confidence in how their vendors handle data. We've completed our SOC 2 Type II audit, confirming that Northbridge's data handling practices meet enterprise security standards.

This certification reflects our commitment to the controls and processes your security team evaluates during procurement and ongoing compliance reviews. Whether you're assessing us for the first time or renewing your trust, this audit provides the third-party validation you need.

Access the audit details and supporting documentation to share with your security team.

CTA: Review our SOC 2 Type II certification details

Certification status, audit scope, and SLA terms vary by plan and are subject to change. Visit northbridgeapp.com/trust for current details.

final_review.notes: Draft is clean. Strong plain-language execution. The phrase "third-party validation you need" could theoretically read as hype, but in context it's factual (SOC 2 is literally third-party validation) and doesn't oversell. Reading level is appropriate. Required disclaimer is present and verbatim. No banned words, no exclamation points, no fear-based language, no unqualified claims. Key message is stated in the opening sentence and reinforced throughout.

attempts.draft:
Subject: Northbridge achieves SOC 2 Type II certification

Preview text: We've completed our security audit. Here's what it means for you.

Body:
Northbridge is now SOC 2 Type II certified, confirming our data handling practices meet enterprise security standards.

This certification validates that our security controls, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy measures have been independently audited and assessed over time. It's the standard enterprise security teams look for during procurement and ongoing vendor reviews.

Whether you're evaluating us for the first time or your security team has requested proof of our security posture, this certification provides the documentation you need.

CTA: Review our SOC 2 Type II certification details

violations.quote: Body text ends with CTA: 'Review our SOC 2 Type II certification details' with no disclaimer following.
violations.suggested_fix: Add the required disclaimer verbatim below the CTA: 'Certification status, audit scope, and SLA terms vary by plan and are subject to change. Visit northbridgeapp.com/trust for current details.'

review.notes: The draft is well-written, factual, and avoids hype language. Reading level is appropriate. However, it is missing the mandatory disclaimer that must accompany any content referencing a specific security certification like SOC 2. This is a hard compliance requirement, not optional."
